IT_SETUP.laptop_request: Laptops are issued on Day 1. Engineering gets MacBook Pro M3; HR gets MacBook Air.
IT_SETUP.vpn_access: All employees must use GlobalProtect VPN for internal tools.
IT_SETUP.security_training: Mandatory security awareness training must be completed within 7 days.

HR_POLICIES.work_hours: Core hours are 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM local time.
HR_POLICIES.pto: 20 days of PTO per calendar year, accrued monthly.
HR_POLICIES.referral_bonus: $2,000 for successful engineering hires; $1,000 for others.

COMPLIANCE.data_privacy: Adherence to GDPR and SOC2 standards is mandatory.
COMPLIANCE.code_of_conduct: Review the company code of conduct in the handbook.
COMPLIANCE.nda: Ensure your signed NDA is uploaded to the portal.

BENEFITS.health_insurance: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage starts from Day 30.
